paper_title: Chironomid Larvae Study in Vallcebre Catchment

methods.description: Statistical analysis of chironomid larvae abundance data to explore spatial and temporal variability, and to describe ecological niches using various statistical methods.

steps.description: Abundance data of identified genera and species of chironomid larvae were reported as density values (individuals m -2), and hydraulic variables were standardized.
steps.searchable_summary: Standardize abundance data and hydraulic variables

steps.description: Discriminat Correspondence Analysis (DCA) on chironomid larvae log-abundance to explore spatial and temporal variability.
Statistical differences among the levels of each factor of classification were assessed by means of Monte-Carlo randomization tests using 999 permutations.
Use Outlying Mean Index (OMI) method for niche analysis, with hydraulic variables and substrate types as descriptors.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply OMI method for niche analysis

steps.description: Evaluate statistical significance of marginality with a Monte Carlo permutation test (n=999).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform Monte Carlo permutation test for marginality

steps.description: Decompose niches into spring and summer sub-niches using the Within Outlying Mean Index (WitOMI).
Estimate niche overlap using reduced PCA dimensions of OMI niches and kernel density functions.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate niche overlap with PCA and kernel density

steps.description: Perform null model permutation tests (n=999) to assess statistical niche differences between species.
steps.searchable_summary: Conduct null model permutation tests for niche differences

methods.description: Collection of chironomid larvae samples and measurement of physicochemical and hydraulic variables to characterize microhabitats.

steps.description: Collect 20 minisurbers per site and season in the years 2009 and 2010.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect minisurber samples for chironomid larvae

steps.description: Measure physicochemical variables including water temperature, dissolved oxygen, pH, and conductivity at each site.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure physicochemical variables at sampling sites

steps.description: Measure water depth and velocity at every point where a minisurber sample was taken.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure water depth and velocity at sampling points

steps.description: Calculate Reynolds and Froude numbers using depth, velocity, and temperature-dependent kinematic viscosity.
